name: Inkblot Studio Design System
description: The canonical design specification for Inkblot Studio. Every rule is explicit, every constraint defined, every edge case handled. Built for AI agents, autonomous workers, and humans collaborating with AI.

principles.name: Radical Clarity
principles.rule: Every design decision must have one correct interpretation. No ambiguity. If a rule can be misread, rewrite it.

principles.name: Composable Independence
principles.rule: Every component is self-contained. It declares its own spacing, sizing, and states. It works in isolation and in composition.

principles.name: Universal Access
principles.rule: WCAG AAA compliance. 7:1 contrast for normal text. 4.5:1 for large text. 44px minimum touch targets. Full keyboard navigation. Reduced motion support. Screen reader semantics.

principles.name: Imperceptible Speed
principles.rule: First paint under 1s. No layout shifts. Lazy-load below fold. CSS-only animations where possible. No render-blocking resources.

principles.name: AI-First Consumption
principles.rule: Every token, component, and rule is machine-parseable JSON. AI agents never guess — they read a deterministic spec.

principles.name: Deliberate Restraint
principles.rule: Use the minimum visual complexity needed. Every shadow, gradient, and animation must earn its place.

normalText.note: Body text, labels, captions against their background

uiComponents.note: Borders, icons, focus rings against adjacent colors

decorative.note: Purely decorative elements have no contrast requirement

touchTargets.rule: Every interactive element must be at least 44x44px. Preferred: 48x48px.

keyboard.rule: Every interactive element must be reachable via Tab. Activation via Enter or Space. Escape closes modals/popovers. Arrow keys navigate within composite widgets.
keyboard.focusIndicator: 2px solid focus ring with 2px offset. Color: semantic.color.border.focus. Never suppressed.

motion.rule: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. When reduced: disable all animations, transitions complete instantly, no parallax, no auto-play.

screenReader.rule: All images have alt text. All icons have aria-label or are aria-hidden. All form inputs have associated labels. Live regions for dynamic content.

colorBlindness.rule: Never use color as the sole indicator. Always pair with shape, icon, text label, or pattern.

light.description: Default. White backgrounds, dark text. Apple-inspired neutrality.

dark.description: True black backgrounds for OLED. Elevated surfaces use gray-900. Brighter accent colors for contrast.

typography.system: System font stack for native rendering. -apple-system on Apple, Segoe UI on Windows, Roboto on Android.

truncation.singleLine: overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap;
truncation.rule: Always truncate rather than overflow. Show full text in tooltip on hover/focus.

recommended.styling: CSS Modules or Tailwind CSS v4 with design tokens as CSS variables
recommended.animation: CSS transitions/animations preferred. Framer Motion for complex orchestration.
recommended.testing: Vitest + Testing Library + Axe-core for accessibility audits
recommended.storybook: Storybook 8+ for component documentation and visual regression

rendering.ssr: Server-side render all critical content. Hydrate interactivity client-side.
rendering.csr: Client-side only for authenticated dashboards, real-time data.
rendering.rule: Default to SSR. Use CSR only when server rendering is impossible.

performance.lazyLoading: Lazy-load all images, components below fold, and routes.
performance.caching: Immutable hashes on all static assets. Cache-Control: max-age=31536000.
performance.codeSpitting: Route-level code splitting. Dynamic imports for modals, popovers, heavy components.
